meta.title: Pricing — CentenarianOS
meta.description: Simple, transparent pricing for CentenarianOS. Starter ($5.46/mo), Monthly ($10.60/mo), or Lifetime ($103.29 one-time). Plus personal longevity coaching.
hero.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
hero.subtitle: Choose a plan and unlock your full personal operating system.
policies: No refunds. Cancel anytime. Monthly fees are not transferable to lifetime membership.
coaching.eyebrow: Prefer a guide over a plan?
coaching.title: Work with a coach, not just a platform.
coaching.subtitle: Personalized 1-on-1 longevity coaching for those who want expert support alongside the tools.
